rulings.Case Title: 270 TURK STREET LLC VS. JULIO COUOH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Unsupported Alter Ego Allegations Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 6, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANTs (CONSOLIDATED CASE) YAT-PANG AU, GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. CASE# 541124, 270 TURK, LLC CASE# 541124, VERITAS INVESTMENTSK INC. CASE# 541124's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Unsupported Alter Ego Allegations Against Defendants DENIED. Alter ego is sufficiently alleged and any purported falsity of the allegation does not appear of the face of the Second Amended Complaint. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: KARLA MELARA VS. JAN I HOLMES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 6, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT JAN HOLMES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on non-payment of rent. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain; all of Plaintiff's claims are outlined in "Exhibit 1." = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: KARLA MELARA VS. JAN I HOLMES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 6, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT JAN HOLMES' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to paragraph 12. Malice is sufficiently alleged. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to paragraph 17(h); Motion is granted with leave to amend as to paragraph 17(f) for plaintiff to pray for daily damages after expiration of the notice to pay or quit. = (501/RBU)
